allocation_expectations.expectation: Hot-path scanning should remain allocation-free after packet buffers, config, and scanners are constructed.

allocation_expectations.scope: native batch output and frame-transform cases
allocation_expectations.expectation: Output uses caller-owned or pre-sized native buffers; overflow should be reported without heap growth in the scan loop.
Allocation is bounded by create-time capacity and snapshot slot count; publish/acquire/release should not resize at runtime.
Python-facing runs include wrapper and conversion overhead, so they are interoperability measurements rather than pure hot-path allocation proofs.
